head_commits: f69b50d fix(api): add rolesGuard to warehouse workers and equipment units write ops
96ed70a fix(api): fix tsc errors — transaction type, audit entity union, reconciliation preview
54edb6f feat(api): audit logging on booking delete and admin user CRUD
b1c47a3 fix(web): admin users tab supports all UserRole values, drop RENTAL_ADMIN
7822777 fix(web): hide destructive actions from WAREHOUSE on bookings and equipment manage
79fdded fix(web): wire DayWarehouse to /api/dashboard/today, gate repair source link
d4be521 fix(web): trim quickAddPayment payload, fix LoginResponse type, redirect to /day
0cee7e4 fix(web): menu — add /calendar and /repair to SA+WH, drop /clients stub
5bcdcbe fix(api): wrap adminUsers CRUD audit writes in $transaction for atomicity
df9e770 chore(web): remove unused useCurrentUser import in repair detail

product_blockers: seed-admin-users.ts line 14/33 still references RENTAL_ADMIN — deploy.sh runs this, would silently fail Prisma validation on every fresh deploy (script excluded from tsconfig, so tsc didn't catch it)
technical_notes: adminUsers CRUD audit writes happen AFTER Prisma op, not inside $transaction — inconsistent with bookings DELETE pattern landed in same cycle, can persist a destructive change without audit if writeAuditEntry throws
Both flagged as small follow-ups; addressed in commits 304ccd2 and 5bcdcbe before merge

review_notes.holistic_review_input: Final holistic review (post-Sprint-5) surfaced 2 CRITICAL + 4 HIGH technical + 8 HIGH product + selected MEDIUMs. Privilege escalation on /api/warehouse/workers/* (no rolesGuard at all) and /api/equipment/:id/units/* wrapper guard granting TECHNICIAN write access. Hardcoded RENTAL_ADMIN throughout admin Users tab blocking WAREHOUSE+TECH user creation. 3 landed tsc errors. Missing audit entries on destructive ops (booking DELETE, AdminUser CRUD). Stale payment payload. Orphan /clients menu item. DayWarehouse placeholders.

fixes_summary.CRITICAL: C1/C2 — /admin Users tab now supports all 3 UserRole values via roleLabel() helper (Руководитель/Кладовщик/Техник) and proper role <select>; every RENTAL_ADMIN reference purged from apps/web/ and apps/api/scripts/seed-admin-users.ts (only migration script + its tests retain legacy mapping, expected).
fixes_summary.HIGH_security: H1 — rolesGuard([SA,WAREHOUSE]) on /api/warehouse/workers/* CRUD; /auth and /workers/names remain public. H2 — per-route guards split read/write on /api/equipment/:id/units/* and /api/equipment-units globals (GET all 3 roles, POST/PATCH/DELETE SA+WH only). Wrapper guard in routes/index.ts removed.
fixes_summary.HIGH_types: H3 — bookings.ts uses Prisma.TransactionClient (not typeof prisma); AuditEntityType union expanded with EquipmentUnit; getReconciliationPreview return shape includes createdRepairIds + failedBrokenUnits. tsc --noEmit exits 0 on both api and web.
fixes_summary.HIGH_audit: H4 — DELETE booking writeAuditEntry inside same $transaction; AdminUser CRUD (create/update/delete) writeAuditEntry inside $transaction (initial commit 54edb6f wrote audit AFTER op; follow-up 5bcdcbe wrapped both in tx for atomicity rollback); P2003 caught cleanly → 409 ADMIN_HAS_AUDIT_HISTORY.
fixes_summary.HIGH_ux: H5 — Delete/Edit buttons gated on isSuperAdmin on /bookings and /equipment/manage. H6 — quickAddPayment payload trimmed to backend Zod schema {bookingId, amount, method, receivedAt}. H7 — DayWarehouse wired to /api/dashboard/today with loading skeleton. H8 — repair source-booking link role-gated SA+WH. H9 — /clients removed from menus (no page existed).
fixes_summary.MEDIUM: M1 — /calendar added to SA+WH menus. M2 — /repair added to WH menu. M3 — LoginResponse.role uses new 3-role union; AdminRole alias updated in auth.ts. M4 — login default redirect /day (was /dashboard 404).

review_notes.security_posture: Zero new privilege-escalation vectors. TECHNICIAN now read-only on equipment units. WAREHOUSE retains operational access. botScopeGuard bypass still works (req.botAccess short-circuits rolesGuard at line 18). New 21-test integration suite (apps/api/src/__tests__/rolesGuardHolistic.test.ts) covers TECH→403 / WH→2xx / SA→2xx + audit-entry creation assertions for H1/H2/H4.
review_notes.reviewer_consensus: Both reviewers verified all original holistic findings closed. Initial 2nd-pass surfaced ONE additional HIGH (seed script — caught by product, escapes tsc since scripts/ is tsconfig-excluded) and ONE consistency MINOR (admin CRUD audit not transactional — caught by technical, real risk: SA delete could persist with no audit if writeAuditEntry throws). Both addressed in 3 follow-up commits. Final pass: ACCEPTED + APPROVE.
deferred_out_of_scope: apps/web/app/equipment/manage/page.tsx — inline edit form state (setInlineForm) populated by beginInlineEdit even for WAREHOUSE; harmless (UI button hidden), pre-existing pattern.
apps/web/app/bookings/[id]/page.tsx quickAddPayment uses raw fetch() instead of apiFetch wrapper — pre-existing inconsistency, not introduced this cycle.
Project-wide ESLint v9 config error (npm run lint fails) — pre-existing on main, unrelated to feature.

tests.new_tests: 21 integration tests in apps/api/src/__tests__/rolesGuardHolistic.test.ts covering H1/H2/H4: TECHNICIAN→403 / WAREHOUSE→2xx / SUPER_ADMIN→2xx on warehouse workers + equipment units; audit-entry creation on adminUser CRUD
